## OneThird Algebraic Program — ARC FULL CLOSE on analytic floor question at currently-known n

### Reference bars (unchanged from yesterday)

1/3 (global tight) / 6/17 (width-3 floor, empirical + analytic at ladder n) / 134/375 (odd-n off-ladder) / 4/11 (descent ladder k=11) / 14/39 (descent ladder k=13) / 8/21 (width-3 SP SHARP) / 2/5 (Family D) / 27/70 (skew Family A SKEW-ARTIFACT) / 1/2 (M_{q+1} closed-form).

### Descent ladder identity

Q = (k+1)/(3k) at k ∈ {11, 13, 17}; binding-pair Pr = (2k−1)/(3k) → 2/3. Empirical pointer: inf Q at width 3 = 1/3.

### Analytic theorems (eleven; four NEW today)

1. **T1** (Prong 1) — central-symmetry pair identity + signed-gap wall.
2. **T2** (Prong 3A) — Q ≥ 8/21 SHARP for width-exactly-3 SP, all n.
3. **T3** (Prong 3D-α) — gadget identity Pr[x<y_i] = i/(t+1).
4. **T4** (Prong 3E-α) — σ-orbit reduction Q = max over orbit reps.
5. **T5** (Prong 3E-α) — expected-rank antisymmetry r̄(x) + r̄(σx) = n+1.
6. **T6** (Prong 3H-α) — Q-preserving extreme adjunction / ordinal-sum: Q(P ⊕ R) = max(Q(P), Q(R)).
7. **T7** (Prong 3H-α) — extreme-reduction: Q(P) = Q(core(P)); inf reduces to extreme-reduced core.
8. **SD0** (Prong 3I-α — NEW) — Q dual-invariance: Q(P) = Q(P*) UNCONDITIONAL via Stanley reversal bijection.
9. **SD1** (Prong 3I-α — NEW) — M_n is dual-closed; non-self-dual classes come in even-size dual pairs.
10. **SD-UNIQ** (Prong 3I-α — NEW) — |M_n|=1 forces self-dual.
11. **SD-PARITY** (Prong 3I-α — NEW) — |M_n| odd forces ≥1 self-dual class.

**Plus today's unconditional closure result (Prong 3I-β):** |M_n|=1 PROVED at all three known ladder n ∈ {5, 7, 10}. Combined with T7 + SD-UNIQ, **SD-FLOOR closes UNCONDITIONALLY at every currently-known floor-attaining n**; full-arena floor → extreme-reduced floor → self-dual floor chain is unconditional at n ∈ {5, 7, 10}.

### Four proven structural walls

| # | Prong | Family / class | Wall |
|---|---|---|---|
| W1 | 1 | Family A self-dual skew | box-rotation signed-gap MIRRORS bias, not cancels |
| W2 | 3B-β | Family D finite-geometry incidence | algebraic construction can't produce cofinal-q width-3 |
| W3 | 3B-γ | Family C order-polytope | Ehrhart dilation parameter Q-invariant |
| W4 | 3E-α | self-dual width-3 | signed-gap Φ-invariance on near-twin σ-orbit MIRRORS bias |

### Today's literal-vs-correct-residual disambiguation (mg-f6d3 → mg-f111)

- **Literal SD-perN (yesterday's 3H-α framing):** ∀n, every Q-minimizing extreme-reduced width-3 poset is self-dual. **REFUTED at n=6 off-floor benign** — dual pair {C, C*} both Q=15/37, neither self-dual; Q ≫ 6/17 corridor floor so does NOT break the floor; cleanly excises the over-strong literal hypothesis.
- **Correct residual SD-FLOOR:** at every n where the global floor q* is attained, M_n contains a self-dual class. **PROVED unconditionally at n ∈ {5, 7, 10}** via |M_n|=1 + SD-UNIQ.

### Sequence today (single day, 3 polecats — net 14 over 2 days)

- Prong 3I-α (mg-f6d3): NUANCED — REFUTATION SD-perN off-floor benign + Q dual-invariance gateway proved + PARTIAL SD-FLOOR.
- Prong 3I-β (mg-f111): STRONG-ALL — |M_n|=1 PROVED at n ∈ {5, 7, 10}; SD-FLOOR closes UNCONDITIONALLY at ladder n's; T7 correct conditional → arc-wrap.
- Prong 3I-hygiene (mg-ecf0): GREEN — doc cleanup; doc-set publication-ready.

### Live / queued tickets (Algebraic Program)

- **In flight:** none (mg-ecf0 just merged).
- **Next to file:** NONE in scope. (a) write-up scoping is Daniel-direction-required (audience: arXiv vs Lean vs exec-summary). (c) Missing Input B is research-grade beyond polecat. HPC n ≥ 12 is HPC-grade beyond polecat.
- **Parked:** Prong 3B-α (formal closure of Prong 3A non-binding lemmas); Missing Input A (forced-relation skew-SYT ratio bound); Missing Input B (forced-relation order-polytope ratio bound); Prong 3H-β / 3G-β (HPC sweep n≥12 needs ~2·10⁷ to ~1.6·10⁸ classes per level); write-up scoping (Daniel-direction-required).

### Trajectory

- **Algebraic Program:** ARC FULL CLOSE on analytic floor question at currently-known floor-attaining n. Today's (b) gateway closure is the clean end of the "cheap parameter-space mapping + structural exploration" phase Daniel's vision called for. Doc-set publication-ready. No in-scope polecat work remains until Daniel-direction choice (a) vs (c) opens further work. The methodological-hope distinguisher (V2 closed-form Q from algebraic parameters) held across all 14 prongs.
